name: Engagement Hook
description: Question or poll-style post designed to drive quality comments (>15 words) — the strongest LinkedIn ranking signal.

variables.name: question
variables.description: Provocative or thought-provoking question — first 210 chars before 'see more'

variables.name: options
variables.description: 2-4 options or perspectives to choose from (use emoji bullets)

variables.name: cta
variables.description: Engagement invitation. E.g. 'Share your perspective below.' Avoid engagement bait ('Comment YES').

tips: Quality comments (>15 words) give 10-15x more reach than likes
Avoid engagement bait ('Comment YES') — LinkedIn penalizes this
Reply to every comment in the golden hour (first 60 min)
Polls get record impressions but few comments — use sparingly
